text:
Indicates Whether Submitted Web Survey Came from Prenotification Letter, Web Invitation, or Reminder 
SAS Format: WEBF 
1: Prenotification letter URL/PIN 
2: Paper web invitation URL/PIN 
3: Email web invitation URL/PIN 
4: Email reminder URL/PIN 
8: Not Applicable 
web_at_home: RECODE : Do you ever use the internet at home 
SAS Format: YNA 
1: YES 
2: NO 
ws_wes_comp: WESTAT: Complete for Analysis and Reporting 
SAS Format: WESCOF 
0: NOT COMPLETE FOR ANALYSIS 
1: COMPLETE FOR ANALYSIS
